meta.name: lookuptable
meta.description: Maps words from words.json to their true root word in root_words.json. Each word is honored by its original meaning — what the word itself means by its own history, not what people have reinterpreted it to mean over time. The root field references a root entry in root_words.json by its 'root' key.

abandon.true_meaning: to put under someone else's control — to release one's being into another's power

able.true_meaning: having the power to carry, to bear a task through to completion

about.true_meaning: on the outside of, around — turning around something

above.true_meaning: over, upward from — from the opening upward

absolute.true_meaning: loosened from all else, complete in itself, whole and unbound

absorb.true_meaning: to swallow up, to drink in, to take in as water into earth

accord.true_meaning: to bring heart to heart, to be of one heart

ache.true_meaning: a sustained pain, the body's vital force signaling disturbance

acknowledge.true_meaning: to recognize the name and nature of something, to admit knowing

acre.true_meaning: a field, open land, a measure of earth

act.true_meaning: to do, to drive, to set in motion by the hand of agency

add.true_meaning: to put together, to join one thing to another

afraid.true_meaning: broken peace — deprived of peace, the state of having one's calm fractured

age.true_meaning: a span of time, a turning of the wheel of years

agree.true_meaning: to be pleasing to, to bring hearts into harmony

air.true_meaning: the breath of the sky, the invisible substance we breathe

alert.true_meaning: on the watchtower, with eyes open, fully seeing

alive.true_meaning: having life, in the state of living, animated by the life force

all.true_meaning: the whole, every part, the complete totality — primal strength encompassing everything

alone.true_meaning: all-one, completely oneself, whole in solitude

alpha.true_meaning: the first, the beginning, the ox-strength that starts all things

analogy.true_meaning: a reasoning by proportion, seeing the same pattern across different things

ancestor.true_meaning: one who goes before, the one who opened the path before you

anchor.true_meaning: that which holds fast to life, the hook that binds to the ground

angle.true_meaning: the bend, the meeting point of two lines — the knot where directions join

ankle.true_meaning: the joint-knot of the foot, the living hinge that lets us walk

annotate.true_meaning: to mark a point, to tie a note to a place in the text

appeal.true_meaning: to drive toward, to push one's plea forward, to call with urgent force

appear.true_meaning: to come forth into sight, to rise out from concealment

apple.true_meaning: fruit — originally any round whole fruit, the complete offering of the tree

arc.true_meaning: a curve, a bow-shape, the path of something thrown

arch.true_meaning: a curved structure that spans and holds, the first principle of building

archetype.true_meaning: the first pattern, the original mold from which copies are made

architect.true_meaning: the chief builder, master of the first principles of structure

archive.true_meaning: the place of beginnings, where original records are kept

arctic.true_meaning: of the bear (Arktos), the northern land beneath the bear constellation

art.true_meaning: skill of the hand, the fitting together of elements with craft

aspire.true_meaning: to breathe toward, to reach upward like rising breath

awake.true_meaning: risen from sleep, with eyes open, in the state of seeing — alert, not dormant

aware.true_meaning: watchful, having one's eyes turned toward, in the act of perceiving

balance.true_meaning: having two scales equal, the state of cosmic order between opposing forces

be.true_meaning: to exist, to have being, the most fundamental state — the soul present

bear.true_meaning: to carry, to support, to bring forth — the one who carries life and weight

beauty.true_meaning: that which is complete, well-formed, pleasing in its wholeness

become.true_meaning: to come into being, to arrive at a new state of existence

begin.true_meaning: to open, to start upon — the head-point from which action flows

behold.true_meaning: to hold in sight, to see fully — the gasp of witness through the window of awareness

being.true_meaning: the state of existing, the soul that persists through all change

believe.true_meaning: to hold dear, to love, to trust — what you hold firm in your heart

beta.true_meaning: the second, the house — the container that follows the first breath

bind.true_meaning: to tie together, to knot, to fasten one thing to another

birth.true_meaning: the act of bearing forth, carrying a new life out into the world

blood.true_meaning: the life-water that flows within, the sacred inner current

bloom.true_meaning: to burst into flower, the generative moment when the bud opens

blow.true_meaning: to send forth breath, to move air with force

body.true_meaning: the house of the soul, the container of being, the dwelling of life

bone.true_meaning: the hard inner support, the prop that holds the body upright

book.true_meaning: beech-wood tablet — where words were carved, a container of ordered knowledge

born.true_meaning: brought into being, carried forth into existence

both.true_meaning: the two together, both housed in the same statement

brain.true_meaning: the organ of the mind, the physical seat of thought and measuring

brave.true_meaning: having heart-strength, wild courage, fierce in spirit

bread.true_meaning: that which is broken — a morsel, a fragment broken off to share

break.true_meaning: to crack apart, to fracture, to shatter into pieces

breath.true_meaning: the air drawn in and released, the spirit made physical, the sign of life

bridge.true_meaning: the structure that carries across, the beam laid over the gap

bring.true_meaning: to carry toward, to bear something to someone

brother.true_meaning: one who bears the same origin, carried from the same source

build.true_meaning: to construct a dwelling, to make a house, to establish a structure

burden.true_meaning: that which is carried, a heavy load borne on the back

burn.true_meaning: to be consumed by fire, to transform through flame

call.true_meaning: to cry out, to summon the vital force, to invoke by name

calm.true_meaning: the heat of the day spent resting — stillness, balance, ordered peace

camel.true_meaning: the carrier across deserts, the bridge between oases

candle.true_meaning: the shining one, a stick that gives light, from the act of glowing

cap.true_meaning: a covering for the head, a palm-like dome placed over

cardiac.true_meaning: of the heart, belonging to the heart

care.true_meaning: to grieve, to feel sorrow for — the vital force turned toward another's suffering

carry.true_meaning: to bear from one place to another, to transport across distance

catch.true_meaning: to seize, to chase and capture, to enclose in one's grasp

cause.true_meaning: that which brings about, the animating force behind an event

chain.true_meaning: a linked enclosure, connected rings that bind and fence

change.true_meaning: to exchange, to transform, to become other than what was — the scarab's becoming

chapter.true_meaning: a heading, a division — each chapter a new stage of becoming

child.true_meaning: offspring, the generated one, fruit of the womb

circle.true_meaning: the complete round, the line that returns to where it began

clean.true_meaning: bright, clear, pure, shining — free of what dims or darkens

clear.true_meaning: bright, transparent, full of light, unobstructed to vision

climb.true_meaning: to ascend by clinging, to rise upward with effort toward stability

close.true_meaning: to shut, to enclose, to bring the fence together

cold.true_meaning: lacking warmth, the chill of frozen water, the ice-state

come.true_meaning: to move toward, to arrive, to journey hither

comfort.true_meaning: to strengthen greatly, to give strong support, to prop up the suffering

compel.true_meaning: to drive together, to push toward action, to force forward

complete.true_meaning: filled up entirely, whole, lacking nothing — all parts present

connect.true_meaning: to knot together, to fasten one thing to another at a junction point

conscience.true_meaning: inner knowing, the hook that catches you when you stray from right

console.true_meaning: to bring wholeness to the grieving, to make the broken soul sole again

conspire.true_meaning: to breathe together, to share breath in secret agreement

contain.true_meaning: to hold within boundaries, to keep fenced inside

convert.true_meaning: to turn together, to revolve toward a new direction or belief

core.true_meaning: the heart of a thing, the innermost center

correct.true_meaning: made straight, set right, aligned with the true direction

courage.true_meaning: heart-quality, the strength that comes from the heart, acting from the core

craft.true_meaning: strength of hand, skill, the power to make with agency

create.true_meaning: to bring forth, to cause to grow, to transform potential into form

cup.true_meaning: a hollow vessel, shaped like an open palm, that receives and holds

cure.true_meaning: to restore to soundness, to make whole again, to heal

current.true_meaning: that which runs, the flowing stream, water in motion

cycle.true_meaning: a wheel, a circle of returning, the journey that comes back to its start

dance.true_meaning: to turn, to revolve the body rhythmically, movement in spirals

dark.true_meaning: hidden, concealed, enclosed away from light

dawn.true_meaning: the first light, the shining that breaks the dark, radiance returning

day.true_meaning: the burning time, the period of light, when radiance rules

deal.true_meaning: to divide, to distribute, to portion out through the door of exchange

death.true_meaning: the final mark, the completion, the signing of life's end

deep.true_meaning: reaching far down, profound — into the primordial waters, the abyss

delta.true_meaning: the door-shaped letter, the triangular mouth where a river divides

dialogue.true_meaning: word passed between two, reason exchanged across speakers

dimension.true_meaning: a measuring out, the mind's act of defining extent

direct.true_meaning: to set straight, to guide in a right line, to rule the course

discover.true_meaning: to uncover, to remove the veil and see what was hidden

divide.true_meaning: to separate into parts, to make a door between what was one

door.true_meaning: the gateway, the threshold between inside and outside, the opening

dream.true_meaning: a vision in sleep, the eye of the mind seeing when the body's eyes close

drink.true_meaning: to draw water in, to pull liquid into the body

drive.true_meaning: to push forward, to compel movement, to propel

dust.true_meaning: fine earth, ground-matter reduced to powder, the smallest grains of ground

duty.true_meaning: that which is owed, what one is held firm to do — the dharma of obligation

dwell.true_meaning: to remain in a house, to linger in a dwelling, to inhabit

ear.true_meaning: the organ of hearing, the body's instrument of listening and receiving sound

earth.true_meaning: the ground, the world of soil and stone, the solid foundation beneath all

emerge.true_meaning: to rise out from, to come forth from concealment into visibility

emergency.true_meaning: that which rises out suddenly, an unforeseen arising that demands response

emotion.true_meaning: that which moves within — the inner waters, feelings that flow like currents

enchant.true_meaning: to sing a spell into, to cast words of power that reshape perception

endure.true_meaning: to hold firm, to harden against difficulty, to persist without breaking

energy.true_meaning: the vital force at work, the animating power within action

enjoy.true_meaning: to take pleasure in, to hold beauty and goodness within oneself

enter.true_meaning: to go into, to cross the ground of a threshold, to step within

equal.true_meaning: level, balanced, the same on both sides of the scale

erect.true_meaning: set straight up, directed upward, aligned with the vertical

essence.true_meaning: that which truly is, the being-nature of a thing, its realness

eternal.true_meaning: of unending time, the wheel that turns forever, outside the cycle of ending

evident.true_meaning: that which is seen clearly, visible to knowledge, plain to sight

evolve.true_meaning: to unroll, to turn outward, to unfold from within over time

exist.true_meaning: to stand forth, to step out into being, to have presence in the world

expire.true_meaning: to breathe out for the last time, to let the spirit depart

explore.true_meaning: to cry out as one goes — to open the way forward by seeking

external.true_meaning: on the outside, beyond the ground of the interior

eye.true_meaning: the organ of sight, the seer, the maker of vision — to see is to make real

fabric.true_meaning: that which is made by weaving, the woven structure of interconnected threads

face.true_meaning: the front of the head, what is seen first, the surface one shows to the world

fact.true_meaning: a thing done, a deed, something made actual by action

fair.true_meaning: beautiful, pleasing, just, light-complexioned — that which is complete in its goodness

faith.true_meaning: firm trust, to hold fast to conviction, loyalty that does not break

fall.true_meaning: to drop down, to be pulled by the earth, to descend

family.true_meaning: the household, all who dwell under one vibration, the home-group

far.true_meaning: at a great opening, far from where one stands, distant across the path

fast.true_meaning: firm, fixed, steadfast — originally meaning immovable, not quick

father.true_meaning: the one who opens the way, protector, the expansive principle that sends forth

fear.true_meaning: to try, to risk, peril — the fracturing of calm before danger

feel.true_meaning: to perceive through touch, to sense, to receive awareness through the body

fertile.true_meaning: bearing abundantly, carrying much fruit, able to bring forth life

fill.true_meaning: to make full, to complete, to bring to wholeness

find.true_meaning: to come upon, what one encounters while walking the path

fine.true_meaning: finished, perfected, brought to completion, of excellent quality

finish.true_meaning: to bring to an end, to perfect, to complete the making

fire.true_meaning: flame, the consuming transformer, that which devours and purifies

firm.true_meaning: held fast, fixed, solid — that which holds its ground and does not yield

fish.true_meaning: the creature that swims in the deep, life moving through hidden waters

flame.true_meaning: the visible body of fire, burning light that devours and transforms

flesh.true_meaning: the soft substance of the body, the material house of the living spirit

float.true_meaning: to rest upon water, to be carried by the flow without sinking

flood.true_meaning: water overflowing its bounds, the great flow that covers the land

floor.true_meaning: the flat ground surface inside, the earth-level of a dwelling

flow.true_meaning: to move as water moves, to stream continuously forward

fly.true_meaning: to move through air, to go forth on wings, to open into sky

follow.true_meaning: to go along the path behind another, to accompany on the way

food.true_meaning: that which nourishes, the sustaining matter, what the mother-earth provides

foot.true_meaning: the lowest part that treads the path, the body's contact with the way

force.true_meaning: strength, might, the push that compels movement

forest.true_meaning: the outside woodland, the wild terrain beyond the fenced land

forget.true_meaning: to lose one's mental grip, to fail to hold in the measuring mind

forgive.true_meaning: to give completely, to release the debt from one's palm, to let go entirely

form.true_meaning: shape, the visible pattern of becoming, that which transformation produces

foundation.true_meaning: that which holds firm beneath, the base that sustains all above it

fraction.true_meaning: a breaking, a part broken off from the whole

fracture.true_meaning: a break, the act of cracking, the line where wholeness splits

fragile.true_meaning: easily broken, liable to fracture, delicate in structure

fragment.true_meaning: a piece broken off, a shard, a part separated from the whole

free.true_meaning: beloved, dear — the free were the loved kin, not the enslaved strangers

freeze.true_meaning: water becoming solid, the flow stopped, the liquid bound to stillness

frost.true_meaning: frozen moisture, ice-crystals formed from water in the cold air

fruit.true_meaning: the produce of a plant, what is generated, the offspring of the tree

full.true_meaning: complete, filled to capacity, whole and lacking nothing

furnace.true_meaning: an enclosed fire, the chamber where flame consumes and transforms

game.true_meaning: sport, play, amusement — the journey through structured challenge

gamma.true_meaning: the third letter, from the camel — the carrier across

gate.true_meaning: an opening in a fence or wall, the door of a yard

gather.true_meaning: to bring together, to collect into one, to unite the scattered

gene.true_meaning: the unit of birth, the seed of becoming, the code of generation

generate.true_meaning: to bring into being, to birth, to produce offspring or new things

genesis.true_meaning: origin, birth, the coming-into-being, the first generation

genius.true_meaning: inborn spirit, the guardian nature born with each person, natural capacity

genre.true_meaning: kind, type, a family of similar works sharing common birth-traits

gentle.true_meaning: well-born, noble by nature, soft in manner because secure in origin

genuine.true_meaning: natural, authentic, as originally born — not falsified or corrupted

give.true_meaning: to hand over, to offer from the open palm, to release into another's grasp

glass.true_meaning: the gleaming substance, that which shines and lets light through

glow.true_meaning: to shine with steady light, to emit warm radiance without flame

go.true_meaning: to move, to journey, to carry oneself from one place toward another

god.true_meaning: the invoked one, called upon through offering — the vital force that animates all

gold.true_meaning: the shining metal, that which gleams with its own light

good.true_meaning: fitting, suitable, proper, gathered together rightly — beautiful in its rightness

grasp.true_meaning: to seize with the palm, to grip, to take hold firmly with the hand

ground.true_meaning: the bottom, the earth surface, the foundation of all that stands

grow.true_meaning: to increase, to become more, to develop from seed toward fullness

guard.true_meaning: to watch over, to protect, to keep the house safe

guide.true_meaning: to lead, to show the way, to goad gently toward the right path

hack.true_meaning: to cut roughly, to break into — a raw application of force to reshape

hale.true_meaning: whole, sound, healthy, robust — the body complete and unbroken

hand.true_meaning: the organ of doing, the instrument of agency, the grasper and maker

harbor.true_meaning: shelter for ships, the house of the fleet, a protected enclosure

harm.true_meaning: injury, damage, the breaking of well-being

harvest.true_meaning: the gathering of what the earth-mother produced, the reaping of matured growth

heal.true_meaning: to make whole, to restore completeness, to close what was broken

health.true_meaning: the state of being whole, completeness of body and spirit

hear.true_meaning: to perceive with the ear, to receive sound, to listen and understand

heart.true_meaning: the pumping center, the seat of courage and feeling, the core of a person

heat.true_meaning: warmth, the energy of fire, the tooth of flame felt without contact

heaven.true_meaning: the high realm, the sky-window through which the divine is glimpsed

hedge.true_meaning: a living fence, a row of bushes forming an enclosure, a boundary of growth

heed.true_meaning: to pay attention, to listen carefully, to guard with awareness

help.true_meaning: to support, to prop up, to sustain someone who is falling

here.true_meaning: in this place, present, where one stands and beholds

hero.true_meaning: protector, the one who goes forth to guard, who stands before danger

hex.true_meaning: a spell, a curse, a word of magical power directed against someone

hold.true_meaning: to keep firm, to grasp and not release, to sustain in place

hole.true_meaning: an opening, a hollow, a gap in a surface — a door into the hidden

holistic.true_meaning: considering the whole, seeing all parts as one complete unity

holy.true_meaning: whole, unbroken, sacred because complete — the wholeness that is divine

home.true_meaning: the place of rest, the dwelling of belonging, where one's vibration resonates

honest.true_meaning: honorable, worthy of respect — rooted in what truly is

honor.true_meaning: esteem, dignity, worth — given to those who embody right order

hope.true_meaning: to leap forward in expectation, to breathe toward what may come

horizon.true_meaning: the bounding circle, the arc where earth and sky meet

house.true_meaning: a dwelling, a container for living, the sheltering structure

human.true_meaning: earthling, of the earth, one made from the ground (from humus — soil)

ice.true_meaning: frozen water, the still form of flow, water made solid by cold

idea.true_meaning: a form seen by the mind's eye, a pattern perceived inwardly

ignite.true_meaning: to set fire to, to bring flame into being, to kindle

illuminate.true_meaning: to fill with light, to make visible, to shine upon

illustrate.true_meaning: to light up, to make clear by shining light on, to reveal through images

image.true_meaning: a likeness, a copy of what the eye sees, a representation of vision

imagine.true_meaning: to form images in the mind's eye, to see what is not yet visible

impulse.true_meaning: the push from within, the sudden drive to action before thought intervenes

incantation.true_meaning: a chanting of magical words, singing power into reality

inspire.true_meaning: to breathe spirit into, to fill with the breath of life or vision

intention.true_meaning: the stretching of the hand toward a purpose, the direction of agency

inter.true_meaning: between, among, within the earth — to inter is to place in the ground

iota.true_meaning: the smallest letter, the tiniest mark of the hand

iris.true_meaning: rainbow, the colored circle of the eye that controls seeing

island.true_meaning: water-land, ground surrounded by water, earth in the midst of flow

join.true_meaning: to bring together, to yoke, to unite separate things into one

jot.true_meaning: the smallest mark, a quick stroke of the hand, the tiniest written thing

journey.true_meaning: a day's travel, the act of carrying oneself across distance

joy.true_meaning: inner delight, the beauty of gladness, pleasure from within

judge.true_meaning: to weigh on the scales of truth, to measure against cosmic order

just.true_meaning: righteous, upright, in accordance with what is right — caught by the hook of truth

justice.true_meaning: righteousness enacted, the state where right action prevails, the fishhook of truth in society

keep.true_meaning: to hold in the palm, to guard, to look after, to maintain possession

key.true_meaning: the device that opens the door, the instrument of threshold-crossing

kin.true_meaning: family, those born of the same origin, the birth-group

kind.true_meaning: nature, type, birth-quality — one's kind is one's inborn nature

kindle.true_meaning: to set fire to, to bring flame into being, to start the burn

king.true_meaning: man of the kin, leader of the birth-group, head of the family-nation

knot.true_meaning: a tied binding, where threads meet and hold, the point of fastening

know.true_meaning: to recognize, to perceive with understanding — to know a thing's name is to have power over it

lake.true_meaning: standing water, a body of water enclosed by land

lamp.true_meaning: a vessel that gives light, a container for flame that illuminates

land.true_meaning: ground, terrain, the earth's surface, the solid place

language.true_meaning: the tongue's expression, the ordered system of words, reason made audible

law.true_meaning: that which is laid down, the rule set by the goad of authority, what drives right conduct

lead.true_meaning: to guide forward, to goad in the right direction, to go first on the path

leaf.true_meaning: the green growth of a tree, what the plant generates to breathe and feed

learn.true_meaning: to follow a track of knowledge, driven by the goad of curiosity toward understanding

lecture.true_meaning: a reading, a discourse of ordered words, reason spoken to an audience

lesson.true_meaning: a thing to be learned, the reading assigned by the teacher's goad

life.true_meaning: the state of living, vitality, the union of body and spirit that creates existence

light.true_meaning: visible radiance, that which makes seeing possible, illumination

link.true_meaning: a ring in a chain, a connection that binds, the knot between two things

listen.true_meaning: to lean the ear toward, to give attention to sound, to receive with awareness

live.true_meaning: to have life, to persist in being, to remain animated by the vital force

log.true_meaning: a record, a reckoning, the word set down to preserve account

logic.true_meaning: the art of reason, the ordered pattern of thought, the word made systematic

look.true_meaning: to direct the eye, to seek with vision, to turn one's seeing toward

love.true_meaning: to care deeply, to hold dear — the vital force directed toward another

lucid.true_meaning: full of light, clear, bright with understanding, transparent

luminous.true_meaning: emitting light, glowing, shining from within

lunar.true_meaning: of the moon, the reflected light, the gentler radiance of night

luxury.true_meaning: excess, abundance of light and splendor, sumptuous living

make.true_meaning: to fashion, to build, to shape matter into form — the mother-act of creation

man.true_meaning: a thinking being, one who has mind — originally any human person, not gendered

mark.true_meaning: a sign left, a visible trace, the scratch or stamp that identifies

match.true_meaning: an equal pairing, that which balances, things measured to be the same

material.true_meaning: of matter, the substance from which things are made, mother-stuff

math.true_meaning: the science of measuring, the mother-discipline of quantity and pattern

matrix.true_meaning: the womb, the mold, the mother-structure from which form emerges

matter.true_meaning: substance, the mother-material of which all physical things are made

mature.true_meaning: ripened, brought to fullness by the mother-principle of time

mean.true_meaning: to have in mind, to intend, to signify — what the measuring mind produces

measure.true_meaning: to determine extent, to apply the mother-principle of ordering and sizing

melt.true_meaning: to become liquid, to soften into flow, solid returning to water-state

memory.true_meaning: the mind's water, that which flows back from the past, the stream of remembered experience

mental.true_meaning: of the mind, belonging to thought, within the measuring faculty

merit.true_meaning: deserved worth, value that has emerged and been earned

metric.true_meaning: a standard of measurement, the instrument of truth-weighing

mind.true_meaning: the thinking organ, the faculty of thought, the inner measurer of reality

mirror.true_meaning: a surface that shows back what the eye sees, the wonder of reflected vision

moderate.true_meaning: kept within measure, balanced, neither excess nor deficiency — right proportion

moon.true_meaning: the measurer of time, the celestial body that marks the months

mother.true_meaning: she who bears and nourishes, the first sound, the ground of life, the matrix

mountain.true_meaning: the earth rising up, ground that stands high, the elevated terrain

mouth.true_meaning: the organ of utterance, where words are born into sound, the opening that speaks

move.true_meaning: to flow from one place to another, to be in motion like water

music.true_meaning: the art of the Muses, organized vibration, sound made beautiful by pattern

mystery.true_meaning: the hidden, the enclosed secret, that which is fenced from common knowing

name.true_meaning: the word that identifies, the utterance that creates and sustains essence

narrate.true_meaning: to tell, to make known by naming events in order, to give account

natal.true_meaning: of birth, relating to the moment of coming into life

nation.true_meaning: a birth-group, those born of the same origin, a people sharing seed

natural.true_meaning: of nature, born that way, according to the seed's own pattern of becoming

nature.true_meaning: the born-quality of a thing, its inborn character, the seed's unfolding

navigate.true_meaning: to steer through water, to find one's way across the flow

need.true_meaning: compulsion, distress, what the vital force demands for survival

nest.true_meaning: the sitting-down place, the house built by birds for their young

net.true_meaning: a mesh of knots, threads tied together at nodes to catch

new.true_meaning: fresh, recent, not yet known — just emerged from the waters of potential

nexus.true_meaning: a binding point, a center of connection where many threads meet

night.true_meaning: the dark time, the return to primordial darkness, chaos before the new dawn

nine.true_meaning: the number before completion, the last step before the cycle closes

noble.true_meaning: well-known, celebrated by name, of illustrious identity

node.true_meaning: a knot-point, where paths cross and connections gather

noon.true_meaning: the ninth hour of light — the height of the day's radiance

north.true_meaning: the left-hand side when facing the dawn — the direction of deep waters and darkness

note.true_meaning: a mark, a sign, a written name or observation set down for remembering

nothing.true_meaning: no thing, the void, the state before form — the primordial absence

noun.true_meaning: a naming word, the word-class that gives things their identity

nourish.true_meaning: to feed, to sustain with mother-substance, to nurse toward growth

novel.true_meaning: new, fresh, never before encountered — just risen from potential

nucleus.true_meaning: the kernel, the inner seed, the core from which new growth comes

nude.true_meaning: bare, uncovered, exposed — in the original state before form clothes the raw

null.true_meaning: nothing, void, not any — the chaos-state of zero, before distinction

number.true_meaning: a unit of measure, the mind's way of counting and ordering reality

nurture.true_meaning: to nourish, to mother, to feed and raise with care

observe.true_meaning: to watch, to see from the source, to keep the eye upon

obvious.true_meaning: in the way, plain to the eye, that which is seen immediately from the source

ocean.true_meaning: the great water, the encircling flow, the primal sea

offer.true_meaning: to carry toward, to bear a gift forward, to bring before another

ohm.true_meaning: unit of resistance — named after Ohm, resonating with the primal vibration

omen.true_meaning: a sign from beyond, a vibration of meaning from the unseen

omni.true_meaning: all, every direction, the totality of the primordial sound

open.true_meaning: unclosed, accessible, the way made clear — the father-principle of expansion

oracle.true_meaning: the speaker, the mouth of the divine, where truth is uttered

order.true_meaning: arrangement in a straight row, proper sequence, the rule applied

origin.true_meaning: the source, the spring from which something rises, the eye of beginning

pace.true_meaning: a step, the opening of distance, the measured stride along the path

page.true_meaning: a leaf of a book, each opening in the passage of text

pain.true_meaning: penalty, punishment — the hook that catches the body in suffering

pan.true_meaning: a wide vessel, spread open, the broad container

parent.true_meaning: one who generates, the birther, the source from which children come

part.true_meaning: a piece separated, what opens away from the whole

pass.true_meaning: to go by, to open through, to move along the way

path.true_meaning: the way forward, the opened ground, the route trodden by those who went before

patient.true_meaning: one who bears, who endures suffering, who carries the weight of waiting

pattern.true_meaning: the father-model, the original template from which copies open

peace.true_meaning: the bound agreement, balance restored, the state of cosmic order between people

per.true_meaning: through, by way of, going forth through a passage

perceive.true_meaning: to see through, to grasp with the eye of understanding

perfect.true_meaning: thoroughly made, completed, brought to full beauty and finish

phone.true_meaning: sound, voice, the mouth's utterance made into a word

phrase.true_meaning: a group of spoken words, an utterance, a portion of the mouth's speech

pillar.true_meaning: the column that holds up, the backbone of a building, the stable support

plant.true_meaning: to set a seed into earth, the act of generating growth from the ground

pool.true_meaning: a still body of water, a gathering of flow into rest

pour.true_meaning: to cause water to flow, to send liquid forth from a vessel

power.true_meaning: ability, the vital force to act, the animating energy behind action

prayer.true_meaning: an asking, the mouth directed upward, words of entreaty spoken to the unseen

present.true_meaning: being here, existing now, the soul in its current place and time

prior.true_meaning: before, earlier, that which went forth first from the house

produce.true_meaning: to lead forth, to bring out from the house of potential into visible form

project.true_meaning: to throw forward, to cast forth from the house into the distance

promise.true_meaning: a word sent forward, the mouth's commitment to the future

propel.true_meaning: to drive forward, to push onward with force

protect.true_meaning: to cover before, to shield the house, to guard from harm

prove.true_meaning: to test, to put forth for examination, to bring out from concealment for judgment

pulse.true_meaning: the rhythmic push of blood, the beating drive of life's current

pure.true_meaning: cleansed by fire, free of corruption, refined to essence

push.true_meaning: to press forward, to drive with force, to thrust away from

quest.true_meaning: a seeking, a circling search, the journey to find what is sought

question.true_meaning: a seeking by asking, the circuit of inquiry that returns with an answer

quiet.true_meaning: at rest, in balanced stillness, undisturbed order

rain.true_meaning: water falling from above, the sky returning moisture to the earth

radiant.true_meaning: sending forth rays, shining with source light, brilliant with radiance

ratio.true_meaning: a reckoning, a calculation of proportion — reason illuminated by number

ray.true_meaning: a beam of light, a line of radiance streaming from a source

read.true_meaning: to advise, to counsel, to interpret marks — bringing light to symbols, illuminating meaning

real.true_meaning: having existence, actually being, that which truly is

reason.true_meaning: to reckon, to calculate — the radiance of the mind applied to problems

receive.true_meaning: to take into the open hand, to accept what is given

record.true_meaning: to bring back to heart, to set down so the heart remembers

refine.true_meaning: to make finer, to bring closer to perfection, to purify toward beauty

refract.true_meaning: to break a ray of light, to bend by breaking the path

regal.true_meaning: of the ruler, royal, having the quality of one who directs in straight lines

regime.true_meaning: a system of rule, an order that directs affairs in a straight course

region.true_meaning: a ruled area, a territory under direction, land governed in order

regulate.true_meaning: to make straight, to control by rule, to keep in proper order

reign.true_meaning: to rule, to direct, to hold the straight line of authority

remember.true_meaning: to bring back to mind, to draw up from the waters of memory again

rename.true_meaning: to give a new name, to change the identity-word

renew.true_meaning: to make new again, to return to the state of fresh potential

repair.true_meaning: to restore, to make whole again what was broken

resonate.true_meaning: to sound again, to echo back, to vibrate in sympathy

resource.true_meaning: that which rises again, a spring that flows back when drawn upon

respond.true_meaning: to pledge back, to answer, to return a signal in kind

respire.true_meaning: to breathe again, the rhythmic back-and-forth of spirit-air

restore.true_meaning: to set up again, to bring back to the original state

result.true_meaning: to spring back, the echo-effect, what flows back from an action

return.true_meaning: to turn back, to flow back to the source, to come again to the start

reveal.true_meaning: to pull back the veil, to make visible what was hidden from the eye

revert.true_meaning: to turn back, to revolve to the former state

right.true_meaning: straight, correct, aligned with the true direction — the stretched line

righteous.true_meaning: acting in accordance with right, caught by the hook of justice, upright

rise.true_meaning: to come up, to emerge from below, to ascend

river.true_meaning: a flowing body of water, the current that carves through land

road.true_meaning: a way for riding, the path of journey, ground prepared for carrying across

root.true_meaning: the hidden foundation, what holds firm beneath, the anchor in the deep

rule.true_meaning: to head, to govern, the chief's act of directing from the summit

sacred.true_meaning: set apart as whole, consecrated, holy because complete and unbroken

satisfy.true_meaning: to make enough, to fulfill, to bring to the state of 'it is'

say.true_meaning: to utter from the mouth, to give words their sounding

sea.true_meaning: the great water, the vast flow, the salt ocean

seal.true_meaning: a mark pressed to close and authenticate, the stamp that completes

search.true_meaning: to go around, to circle seeking, to quest in widening arcs

season.true_meaning: a turn of time, one revolution of the wheel, a portion of the year's cycle

see.true_meaning: to perceive with the eye, to make real through seeing

seed.true_meaning: that which is sown, the germ of new life, the beginning swimming in the deep

seek.true_meaning: to go after, to search, to follow the circuit of inquiry

self.true_meaning: one's own being, the sole center, the individual whole

sense.true_meaning: perception, feeling, the faculty of knowing what is — the realness-detector

shape.true_meaning: to scrape into form, to create by transformation, the result of becoming

sharp.true_meaning: having a cutting edge, keen as a tooth, the blade's quality of fire

shelter.true_meaning: a covering, a protective house, that which shields the vulnerable

shift.true_meaning: to change position, to transform placement, a becoming of new arrangement

shine.true_meaning: to give light, to glow, to blaze — the tooth of fire made visible as radiance

show.true_meaning: to let be seen, to make visible, to reveal by the light of fire and clarity

sight.true_meaning: the act of seeing, vision, the eye's reach into the world

sign.true_meaning: a mark that carries meaning, the gesture or symbol that signifies

silence.true_meaning: the absence of sound, the primal quiet before utterance, the deep before vibration

sing.true_meaning: to make music with the mouth, to give the voice its fullest utterance

soil.true_meaning: the earth, the ground, the terrene substance from which things grow

solar.true_meaning: of the sun, belonging to the singular source of light and warmth

sole.true_meaning: alone, only, the single one — whole and complete in itself

solid.true_meaning: firm, whole, dense, completely filled — not hollow or broken

solo.true_meaning: alone, performed by one, the individual acting as a complete whole

solve.true_meaning: to loosen, to untie, to make whole by releasing the knot of a problem

song.true_meaning: that which is sung, the mouth's offering of melody and word

sooth.true_meaning: truth, what actually is — a soothsayer speaks what truly is

soul.true_meaning: the inner sun, the singular essence of a person, the whole self

sound.true_meaning: vibration perceived by hearing, that which reaches the ear

source.true_meaning: a spring, the point of rising, where something wells up from the deep

spark.true_meaning: a tiny fire-fragment, a flying particle of flame

speak.true_meaning: to utter words from the mouth, to create reality through speech

spiral.true_meaning: a curve that winds outward from a center, the shape of breath in motion

spirit.true_meaning: breath, the animating force, that which is breathed in and gives life

spring.true_meaning: water leaping from the earth, the eye of the ground that sees with water

stable.true_meaning: firmly standing, fixed, not liable to fall — established in its standing

stand.true_meaning: to be upright, to remain on one's feet, to be established

star.true_meaning: the strewn lights, distant suns, radiant points scattered across the night

start.true_meaning: to leap up suddenly, to jump into action, to rise out from stillness

state.true_meaning: the way a thing stands, its condition, its established position

static.true_meaning: standing still, not in motion, fixed in place without change

station.true_meaning: a standing place, where one is positioned, the fixed point

stay.true_meaning: to remain standing, to not depart, to hold one's position

steady.true_meaning: firm in standing, stable, the quality of the backbone — not wavering

stem.true_meaning: the main stalk, the pillar of a plant that holds it upright

step.true_meaning: a pace, a single opening of distance by the foot along the path

still.true_meaning: motionless, standing without movement, calm and fixed

stone.true_meaning: solidified earth that stands firm, hard matter that endures

store.true_meaning: a standing supply, provisions set in place, what is established for use

storm.true_meaning: violent weather, the waters of the sky unleashed in fury

stream.true_meaning: flowing water, a current, the steady movement of liquid along a course

strength.true_meaning: the quality of being strong, the backbone's force, the pillar's endurance

structure.true_meaning: that which is built up, the arranged framework, the stable construction

sun.true_meaning: the great light, source of radiance, the star that gives day

support.true_meaning: to carry from beneath, to prop up, to bear the weight of another

surge.true_meaning: to rise suddenly, to swell up, a powerful emergence of force

survive.true_meaning: to live beyond, to keep life going past the threat, to outlive

sustain.true_meaning: to hold up from below, to keep from falling, to maintain with support

swim.true_meaning: to move through water by one's own effort, to navigate the flow

symbol.true_meaning: a thing thrown together with meaning, a mark that represents by association

sympathy.true_meaning: feeling together, shared suffering, the binding of hearts in common emotion

synapse.true_meaning: the junction where neurons clasp together, the meeting-point of signals

synchronize.true_meaning: to move together in time, to unite the rhythms of separate things

synthesis.true_meaning: placing together, combining separate parts into a united whole

system.true_meaning: a standing-together, parts organized into a functioning whole

tag.true_meaning: a hanging mark, a label attached to identify, a small sign

teach.true_meaning: to show the way, to point out, to goad the student toward knowledge

tear.true_meaning: the water of the eye, emotion becoming liquid, grief made visible as flow

tell.true_meaning: to recount, to name events in order, to give account by making known

term.true_meaning: a boundary, a limit, the edge of a territory of meaning

terrain.true_meaning: the character of the ground, the nature of the earth's surface

territory.true_meaning: a tract of land, an area of earth claimed and defended

test.true_meaning: to try, to put forth for proof, to examine by bringing out

theta.true_meaning: the serpent letter, the wheel of time and transformation

think.true_meaning: to exercise the mind, to measure and weigh with thought

thirst.true_meaning: the dryness, the craving for water, the body calling for flow

throne.true_meaning: the seat of the one who holds firm, the chair of sustained authority

tide.true_meaning: a division of time — the turning of the waters, the wheel of ebb and flow

time.true_meaning: the measured turning, the wheel of moments, the serpent's coil of duration

token.true_meaning: a sign, a mark of proof, a small thing that stands for something greater

tongue.true_meaning: the organ in the mouth that shapes speech, the flesh of utterance

total.true_meaning: the whole sum, the complete count, everything marked and tallied

touch.true_meaning: to bring the hand into contact, the smallest act of the hand upon another

trade.true_meaning: the exchange of goods carried across distance, commerce as journey

transfer.true_meaning: to carry across, to bear from one place or person to another

transform.true_meaning: to change form, to become other, to undergo the scarab's metamorphosis

travel.true_meaning: to journey, to carry oneself across distance, the act of crossing terrain

tree.true_meaning: that which holds firm, the living pillar — true, strong, enduring, deeply rooted

tribe.true_meaning: a division of people, a birth-group, a family-branch of the nation

true.true_meaning: firm as a tree, steadfast, solid — truth is what holds and does not bend

trust.true_meaning: firm reliance, comfort in holding fast, confidence that will not break

truth.true_meaning: that which is tree-firm, the solid state of what is real, faithfulness to what holds

turn.true_meaning: to revolve, to rotate, to follow the serpent's wheel

twist.true_meaning: to wind, to coil, to turn one thing around another like the serpent

understand.true_meaning: to stand among the meaning, to be present in the midst of what is heard

union.true_meaning: the joining of many into one, the act of binding together

unite.true_meaning: to make one, to bind together into a single whole

universe.true_meaning: the one turning, all things revolving as one, the whole of reality in rotation

valley.true_meaning: low ground between hills, the earth's dip, the terrain's hollow

value.true_meaning: worth, strength, the magnitude of a thing's importance

verdant.true_meaning: green, lush with spring growth, showing the truth of the season's turning

verdict.true_meaning: a true saying, the truth spoken by the jury, the declaration of what really is

verify.true_meaning: to make true, to confirm the reality of, to test against what truly is

version.true_meaning: a turning, a particular turning of a work, one revolution of an evolving thing

vert.true_meaning: to turn, green — the turning of seasons toward growth

very.true_meaning: truly, in truth, really, emphasizing the realness of what follows

vine.true_meaning: the climbing plant that hooks and connects, weaving through supports

virtue.true_meaning: moral strength, the power of truth, excellence of character rooted in what is real

vision.true_meaning: the act of seeing, sight, the faculty where perception and knowledge merge

voice.true_meaning: the sound from the mouth, the personal utterance, one's own spoken expression

void.true_meaning: empty, vacant, the primordial absence, the space before creation fills it

vortex.true_meaning: a whirling mass, the turning center, water or air revolving around itself

wake.true_meaning: to open the eyes, to stop sleeping, to enter the state of seeing and awareness

walk.true_meaning: to move on foot along a path, to open distance by stepping

wall.true_meaning: a vertical fence of stone or brick, the enclosing barrier of a house

war.true_meaning: strife, confusion, discord — the great magnitude of human conflict

warp.true_meaning: the lengthwise threads on a loom, the foundation of the weave

warrior.true_meaning: one who engages in the great contest, a person of magnitude in conflict

wash.true_meaning: to cleanse with water, to purify with flow

watch.true_meaning: to keep the eyes upon, to observe through time, to see with sustained attention

water.true_meaning: the flowing element, the universal solvent, the medium of all life

wave.true_meaning: water moving in rhythm, the oscillation of flow, the undulation of the surface

wealth.true_meaning: well-being, the state of faring well, prosperity as wholeness of fortune

weave.true_meaning: to interlace threads, to create fabric by crossing fibers in and out

web.true_meaning: a woven fabric, the interconnected structure, threads joined into a whole

weft.true_meaning: the crosswise threads in weaving, the horizontal element of the fabric

well.true_meaning: a spring, a source of water from the deep, the eye of the earth

wet.true_meaning: covered in water, moistened, in the state of water's presence

whole.true_meaning: complete, entire, unbroken, all parts present and unified

will.true_meaning: to wish, to choose, to determine — the hand of the mind reaching toward the future

wind.true_meaning: moving air, the breath of the atmosphere, invisible spirit made felt

window.true_meaning: wind-eye — the opening in the wall through which breath and light enter

wisdom.true_meaning: the state of having seen, deep knowledge from vision, insight accumulated over time

wish.true_meaning: to desire, to extend the hand of will toward what is wanted

wit.true_meaning: mental sight, quickness of seeing, knowledge through perception

with.true_meaning: alongside, together, the hook of connection — the joining word

witness.true_meaning: one who has seen, one with knowledge of what happened through direct sight

woke.true_meaning: past tense of wake — became alert, opened the eyes, stopped sleeping, entered awareness

word.true_meaning: a spoken unit, the utterance of magnitude, the great act of naming

work.true_meaning: to do, to act, to make — the great deed, effort of magnitude

world.true_meaning: age of man, the great span of human existence, the magnitude of all things

worth.true_meaning: value, the magnitude of a thing's weight, what it truly amounts to

write.true_meaning: to scratch marks, to carve signs — the act of making permanent tokens

year.true_meaning: the full cycle, the complete circuit of seasons, the sun's return to where it began

zeal.true_meaning: passionate fervor, the cutting intensity of devoted purpose

zero.true_meaning: the empty mark, the nothing that divides positive from negative

zone.true_meaning: a belt, a girdle, a divided area — the plow-cut that separates regions
